items.title: New AI-compute cryptocurrency Pearl sparks a GPU mining rush but profitability is already sliding - RTX 5090 daily revenue has halved to $17.19 since April
items.summary: A new cryptocurrency called Pearl has set off a short-lived GPU mining rush.

items.title: The 'ultimate mosquito killer' uses lasers and AI - custom model trained to detect and lock lasers on these pests
items.summary: A computer vision and robotics expert has created and trained what he boasts is "the ultimate mosquito killer" using machine learning and a laser.

items.title: You can still run the original Nvidia Control Panel by grabbing it from the Microsoft Store today - app remains useful to adjust a handful of RTX Pro and Quadro features, and may be handy for troubleshooting

items.title: Apple TV 4K on track to break a record no one wants to see happen
items.summary: It makes sense that Apple TV 4K customers are vocal about the lack of new hardware. The current set-top box , introduced in 2022, runs the risk of breaking a record no one wants to see happen.

items.title: Monitoring Dementia Patients in Care Facilities Using Beacons
items.summary: A study was published recently in JMIR mHealth and uHealth. Researchers evaluated a monitoring method that integrated wrist-worn accelerometers with ankle-worn Bluetooth beacons to track individuals with dementia in a long-term residential...
